examples: His word was a double-barrelled compliment.
The true lumen, false lumen, "double-barrelled aorta", LV morphology and signal contrast were described.
As for our method of knowing them, it can be and is summed up in a word, albeit a double-barrelled word: hypothetico-deductive.
Both men gouged, pounded and pulverised until one lost his balance and was barrelled out of the ring.
The elder, potbellied, carried an ancient single-barrelled shotgun, the butt mended crudely with wire.
